text.name: input_GMF_TOGGLE_REPORT
text.text: Global Market Forces: Toggle Market Report

text.name: gmf_forecast_accuracy_tooltip
text.text: Controls how reliable Market Report forecasts are in this savegame. Disabled hides forecast guidance; Perfect shows exact forecasts.

text.name: gmf_selectMarket
text.text: SELECT A MARKET FOR A DETAILED REPORT

text.name: gmf_detailDisabled
text.text: Outlook: %s. Forecast accuracy is disabled for this savegame.

text.name: gmf_detailOutlook
text.text: Outlook: %s. Selling conditions are %s. Forecast confidence is %s.

text.name: gmf_forecastsDisabled
text.text: Forecasts are disabled for this savegame.

text.name: gmf_forecastDisabledForTerm
text.text: %s: Forecasts are disabled for this savegame.

text.name: gmf_forecastUncertain
text.text: %s: The outlook is uncertain, though prices could %s.

text.name: gmf_brief_noNearTermChange
text.text: Analysts don't anticipate near term changes in the market.

text.name: gmf_brief_awaitingOutlook
text.text: Analysts are awaiting a clearer outlook for the next market cycle.

text.name: gmf_brief_optimistic
text.text: Analysts are optimistic upcoming changes to the market are going to support crop prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_concerned
text.text: Analysts are afraid changes to the market are going to put further pressure on crop prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_calm
text.text: Broad market conditions are currently calm, with no major global drivers active.

text.name: gmf_brief_genericEvent
text.text: A broad world event is affecting market conditions.

text.name: gmf_brief_bullMarket
text.text: Commodity markets are in a broad upswing, generally supporting crop prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_bearMarket
text.text: Commodity markets are in a broad downturn, generally weighing on crop prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_commoditySupercycle
text.text: A long-term commodity boom is providing broad support for crop prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_globalRecession
text.text: A global slowdown is reducing demand and putting broad pressure on prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_energyInflation
text.text: Higher energy costs are adding broad support to commodity prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_war
text.text: Trade disruption is adding market risk.

text.name: gmf_brief_fuelSpike
text.text: Higher fuel costs are raising production and transport costs.

text.name: gmf_brief_bumperHarvest
text.text: Strong harvests are adding supply and softening prices.

text.name: gmf_brief_exportBoom
text.text: Export demand is providing additional market support.
